title: Inside Chewy’s push to build a pet-focused retail media network
description: Chewy says its retail media network has doubled the number of campaigns and advertisers on the platform year-over-year. Here's how it has sought to stand out from other retail media networks in the space.
title_en: Chewy doubles retail media network campaigns with pet-focused advertising strategy
summary_ko: 펫 전문 이커머스 업체 Chewy가 자사 리테일 미디어 네트워크의 광고 캠페인과 광고주 수를 전년 대비 2배 증가시켰다고 발표했습니다. 이는 펫 카테고리에 특화된 독특한 포지셔닝을 통해 다른 리테일 미디어 네트워크와의 차별화를 추구한 결과입니다. Chewy는 펫 관련 브랜드들을 위한 전문화된 광고 플랫폼으로 자리매김하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Pet-focused e-commerce company Chewy announced it has doubled the number of campaigns and advertisers on its retail media network year-over-year. The company has achieved this growth by positioning itself uniquely within the pet category to differentiate from other retail media networks. Chewy is establishing itself as a specialized advertising platform for pet-related brands.
so_what_ko: 카테고리별 전문화된 리테일 미디어 네트워크가 급성장하고 있어, LG D2C 사업부도 특정 카테고리(가전, 생활용품)에 특화된 미디어 플랫폼 구축을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: The rapid growth of category-specialized retail media networks suggests LG D2C should consider building media platforms specialized in specific categories like home appliances and lifestyle products.
key_points: Chewy's retail media network doubled campaigns and advertisers year-over-year
Pet-focused positioning creates differentiation from generic retail media networks
Category specialization drives higher advertiser engagement and platform growth
one_line_insight_ko: 카테고리별 전문화된 리테일 미디어 네트워크가 범용 플랫폼 대비 높은 성장률을 보이고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Category-specialized retail media networks are achieving higher growth rates compared to generic platforms.

title: New Ecommerce Tools: June 3, 2026
description:
New services this week address Reddit ads, email marketing, design tools, crowdshipping, agentic commerce audits, last-mile delivery, and more.
The post New Ecommerce Tools: June 3, 2026 appeared first on Practical Ecommerce.
title_en: Latest ecommerce tools feature agentic commerce audits and AI-powered services
summary_ko: 2026년 6월 3일자 신규 이커머스 도구들이 출시되었으며, Reddit 광고, 이메일 마케팅, 디자인 도구 등 다양한 서비스를 포함합니다. 특히 에이전틱 커머스 감사 및 마지막 단계 배송 서비스 등 AI 기반 솔루션들이 주목받고 있습니다. 크라우드 배송과 같은 혁신적인 물류 솔루션도 새롭게 등장했습니다.
summary_en: New ecommerce tools launched on June 3, 2026, include services for Reddit advertising, email marketing, design tools, and more. AI-powered solutions such as agentic commerce audits and last-mile delivery services are gaining particular attention. Innovative logistics solutions like crowdshipping have also emerged as new offerings.
so_what_ko: 에이전틱 커머스 감사 도구의 등장은 AI 기반 자동화된 커머스 운영이 본격화되고 있음을 의미하므로, LG D2C도 이러한 AI 도구 도입을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: The emergence of agentic commerce audit tools signals the mainstreaming of AI-powered automated commerce operations, requiring LG D2C to consider adopting such AI tools.
key_points: Multiple new ecommerce tools launched covering advertising, marketing, and logistics
Agentic commerce audits represent emerging AI-powered automation trend
Crowdshipping and last-mile delivery solutions address logistics challenges
one_line_insight_ko: 에이전틱 커머스 감사 도구의 등장으로 AI 자동화된 커머스 운영이 현실화되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The emergence of agentic commerce audit tools signals the realization of AI-automated commerce operations.

title: Target has alienated Black-owned brands, founders say, as some startups vanish from its shelves
description: Black founders Modern Retail spoke with said they found Target to be a frustrating wholesale partner.
title_en: Target faces criticism from Black-owned brands over partnership challenges
summary_ko: Target이 흑인 소유 브랜드들과의 파트너십에서 문제를 겪고 있으며, 일부 스타트업 제품이 매장에서 사라지고 있다고 Modern Retail이 보도했습니다. 흑인 창업자들은 Target과의 도매 파트너십이 좌절스럽다고 토로하고 있습니다. 이는 대형 리테일러와 소규모 브랜드 간의 파트너십 운영에서 발생하는 구조적 문제를 드러내고 있습니다.
summary_en: Target is facing issues with its partnerships with Black-owned brands, with some startup products disappearing from shelves, according to Modern Retail. Black founders expressed frustration with Target as a wholesale partner. This reveals structural problems in partnership operations between large retailers and small brands.
so_what_ko: 대형 리테일러와 소규모 브랜드 간의 파트너십 문제는 LG D2C가 다양한 브랜드와 협업할 때 공정하고 지속가능한 파트너십 모델을 구축해야 함을 시사합니다.
so_what_en: Partnership issues between large retailers and small brands suggest LG D2C needs to build fair and sustainable partnership models when collaborating with diverse brands.
key_points: Target faces criticism over partnerships with Black-owned brands
Some startup products are disappearing from Target's shelves
Highlights structural challenges in large retailer-small brand partnerships
one_line_insight_ko: 대형 리테일러의 소규모 브랜드 파트너십 관리 방식이 브랜드 다양성에 미치는 영향이 주목받고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: The impact of large retailers' partnership management approaches on brand diversity is gaining attention.

title: Google’s Universal Cart will soon be available to Walmart, Target shoppers — getting their buy-in may be the hard part
description: Google wants to build the go-to AI-powered shopping cart of the future. But whether shoppers will latch onto it is another question.
title_en: Google's Universal Cart expands to Walmart and Target with AI-powered shopping features
summary_ko: 구글이 AI 기반 쇼핑 카트인 Universal Cart를 월마트와 Target에 확대 적용한다고 발표했습니다. 구글은 미래의 핵심 AI 쇼핑 카트 플랫폼 구축을 목표로 하고 있습니다. 하지만 소비자들이 이 서비스를 실제로 사용할지는 별개의 문제로 남아있습니다.
summary_en: Google announced the expansion of its AI-powered Universal Cart to Walmart and Target. Google aims to build the go-to AI-powered shopping cart platform of the future. However, whether consumers will actually adopt this service remains a separate challenge.
so_what_ko: 구글의 Universal Cart 확장은 AI 기반 통합 쇼핑 경험이 주류화되고 있음을 보여주므로, LG D2C도 Google과 같은 플랫폼과의 통합을 준비해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Google's Universal Cart expansion shows AI-powered integrated shopping experiences are becoming mainstream, requiring LG D2C to prepare for integration with platforms like Google.
key_points: Google's Universal Cart expanding to major retailers Walmart and Target
AI-powered shopping cart aims to become the future standard
Consumer adoption remains the key challenge for platform success
one_line_insight_ko: 구글의 AI 기반 Universal Cart가 주요 리테일러로 확산되며 통합 쇼핑 플랫폼 경쟁이 본격화되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Google's AI-powered Universal Cart expansion to major retailers signals the intensification of integrated shopping platform competition.

title: Amazon applies AI shopping tech to customer retailer agents with AWS
description:
Amazon is now bringing some of the artificial intelligence (AI) technology powering its new shopping agent to other retailers, starting with Kate Spade New York. The latest offering, called Agentic Shopping Assistant, is now available through Amazon Web Services (AWS). It allows retailers outside of Amazon to build and launch their own customized digital AI […]
The post Amazon applies AI shopping tech to customer retailer agents with AWS appeared first on Digital Commerce 360.
title_en: Amazon launches Agentic Shopping Assistant for retailers through AWS platform
summary_ko: 아마존이 자사의 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 기술을 다른 리테일러들에게 제공하기 시작했으며, Kate Spade New York이 첫 번째 파트너로 참여했습니다. AWS를 통해 제공되는 Agentic Shopping Assistant는 아마존 외부 리테일러들이 맞춤형 디지털 AI 어시스턴트를 구축하고 런칭할 수 있게 해줍니다. 이는 아마존이 자사의 AI 기술을 외부 업체에 개방하는 전략적 움직임입니다.
summary_en: Amazon has started offering its AI shopping agent technology to other retailers, with Kate Spade New York as the first partner. The Agentic Shopping Assistant, available through AWS, allows retailers outside Amazon to build and launch customized digital AI assistants. This represents Amazon's strategic move to open its AI technology to external companies.
so_what_ko: 아마존의 AI 쇼핑 어시스턴트 기술 개방은 D2C 브랜드들이 고급 AI 기능을 쉽게 도입할 수 있는 기회를 제공하므로, LG D2C도 이러한 솔루션 활용을 검토해야 합니다.
so_what_en: Amazon's opening of AI shopping assistant technology provides D2C brands with easier access to advanced AI capabilities, requiring LG D2C to consider utilizing such solutions.
key_points: Amazon offers AI shopping agent technology to external retailers through AWS
Kate Spade New York becomes first partner for Agentic Shopping Assistant
Enables retailers to build customized AI assistants outside Amazon's ecosystem
one_line_insight_ko: 아마존이 AI 쇼핑 에이전트 기술을 외부에 개방하면서 에이전틱 커머스의 민주화가 시작되고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Amazon's opening of AI shopping agent technology to external parties marks the beginning of agentic commerce democratization.

title: Ulta’s prestige beauty shines despite consumer pressure
description: The retailer's sales jumped 11% in Q1 with the help of higher-end offerings. Meanwhile, the company is plotting an experiential store in New York City.
title_en: Ulta Beauty's Premium Strategy Drives 11% Q1 Growth Despite Consumer Headwinds
summary_ko: 울타 뷰티가 1분기 매출 11% 성장을 기록하며 고급 미용제품 전략의 성공을 입증했습니다. 소비자들의 지출 압박에도 불구하고 프리미엄 상품군이 성장을 견인했습니다. 회사는 뉴욕에 체험형 매장 오픈을 계획하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Ulta Beauty achieved 11% sales growth in Q1 driven by its prestige beauty product strategy. Despite consumer spending pressures, higher-end offerings fueled the company's growth momentum. The retailer is planning to open an experiential store location in New York City.
so_what_ko: 프리미엄 제품 전략과 체험형 매장이 경제적 압박 상황에서도 성장을 견인할 수 있음을 보여줍니다.
so_what_en: Premium product strategy and experiential retail formats can drive growth even during economic pressures.
key_points: 11% Q1 sales growth driven by prestige beauty products
Higher-end offerings successful despite consumer spending pressure
Planning experiential store format in NYC
one_line_insight_ko: 프리미엄 제품과 체험형 매장이 경제적 불확실성 시기의 성장 동력이 될 수 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Premium products and experiential retail can be growth drivers during economic uncertainty.

title: Target’s ‘food-forward’ strategy includes supply chain improvements, too
description: The retailer’s newest and largest food facility to date replenishes the nearly 130 stores it serves up to two days faster than before.
title_en: Target Accelerates Food Supply Chain with Advanced Distribution Center in Colorado
summary_ko: 타겟이 콜로라도에 최신 식품 유통센터를 오픈하여 공급망 효율성을 높였습니다. 새로운 시설은 약 130개 매장에 기존보다 최대 2일 빠르게 상품을 공급합니다. 이는 타겟의 식품 중심 전략의 일환입니다.
summary_en: Target opened its newest and largest food distribution facility in Colorado to improve supply chain efficiency. The facility serves nearly 130 stores with deliveries up to two days faster than before. This supports Target's food-forward retail strategy.
so_what_ko: 공급망 자동화와 효율성 개선이 D2C 운영에서 경쟁 우위를 만드는 핵심 요소입니다.
so_what_en: Supply chain automation and efficiency improvements are key differentiators in D2C operations.
key_points: Largest food distribution facility to date
Up to 2 days faster delivery to 130 stores
Part of food-forward retail strategy
one_line_insight_ko: 공급망 최적화가 식품 소매 전략의 성공을 좌우하는 핵심 요소입니다.
one_line_insight_en: Supply chain optimization is critical for successful food retail strategy execution.

title: AI Costs Are Outpacing Marketing Budgets, So How Do You Strategize?
description: Corporate America is starting to ration AI, and it’s affecting marketing teams. Axios and The Wall Street Journal report that some enterprises have burned through their entire annual AI budget in just a few months. Others have watched AI spending double or triple with little warning.
title_en: Corporate AI Spending Spirals Beyond Marketing Budgets, Forcing Strategic Rationing
summary_ko: 기업들의 AI 비용이 마케팅 예산을 초과하며 전략적 배분이 필요한 상황입니다. 일부 기업들은 연간 AI 예산을 몇 개월 만에 모두 소진했습니다. AI 지출이 예상보다 2-3배 증가하여 기업들이 AI 사용을 제한하고 있습니다.
summary_en: Corporate AI spending is exceeding marketing budgets, forcing companies to strategically ration AI usage. Some enterprises have depleted their entire annual AI budget within just a few months. AI costs have doubled or tripled unexpectedly, leading to usage restrictions.
so_what_ko: AI 마케팅 투자 시 명확한 ROI 측정과 예산 계획이 필수적이며, 비용 효율적인 AI 솔루션 선택이 중요합니다.
so_what_en: Clear ROI measurement and budget planning are essential for AI marketing investments, with cost-efficient solution selection being critical.
key_points: Companies burning through annual AI budgets in months
AI spending doubling or tripling unexpectedly
Corporate America starting to ration AI usage
Marketing teams particularly affected by budget constraints
one_line_insight_ko: AI 마케팅의 급속한 비용 증가로 ROI 기반의 전략적 투자 접근이 필수가 되었습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Rapid AI marketing cost inflation makes ROI-based strategic investment approach essential.

title: On-page content formats answer engines actually favor [new research]
description: It seems like every brand is scrambling to get a piece of the pie in this new answer engine optimization (AEO) world. But what if you could get ahead of the curve by knowing the best on-page content formats for AI as verified by research? I pored over results from the new HubSpot State of AEO 2026 report and Wix Studio’s AI Search Lab research on most-cited content types to find out.
title_en: Research Reveals Content Formats That Win in AI Answer Engine Optimization
summary_ko: HubSpot과 Wix Studio 연구에 따르면 AI 답변 엔진 최적화(AEO)에서 특정 콘텐츠 형식이 더 효과적입니다. 브랜드들이 AEO 분야에서 앞서나가기 위해 경쟁하고 있습니다. 연구 결과를 통해 AI가 선호하는 온페이지 콘텐츠 형식이 확인되었습니다.
summary_en: Research from HubSpot and Wix Studio reveals specific content formats that perform better in answer engine optimization (AEO). Brands are competing to gain advantage in this new AEO landscape. The studies identified on-page content formats that AI systems favor for citations.
so_what_ko: AI 검색 환경에서 브랜드 가시성을 높이려면 AEO에 최적화된 콘텐츠 전략이 필요합니다.
so_what_en: Optimized content strategy for AEO is essential for brand visibility in AI-driven search environments.
key_points: HubSpot State of AEO 2026 report findings
Wix Studio AI Search Lab research on content citations
Specific on-page content formats favor AI systems
Growing competition in answer engine optimization
one_line_insight_ko: AI 검색 시대에 브랜드 발견성을 위해 답변 엔진 최적화가 새로운 필수 마케팅 역량이 되었습니다.
one_line_insight_en: Answer engine optimization has become a critical marketing capability for brand discoverability in the AI search era.

title: Amazon will show AI product images when you search for some reason
description: Amazon will use visual search and AI to show AI-generated product images that match your search queries. The retailer says it will help guide users to products.
title_en: Amazon Launches AI-Generated Product Images for Visual Search Enhancement
summary_ko: 아마존이 검색 쿼리와 일치하는 AI 생성 제품 이미지를 표시하는 기능을 도입했습니다. 시각적 검색과 AI를 활용하여 사용자를 적합한 제품으로 안내하는 것이 목적입니다. 이 기능은 제품 발견 과정을 개선하기 위한 아마존의 새로운 시도입니다.
summary_en: Amazon introduced a feature that displays AI-generated product images matching search queries. The retailer uses visual search and AI technology to guide users to relevant products. This represents Amazon's new approach to improving product discovery processes.
so_what_ko: AI 생성 이미지를 통한 제품 발견 개선은 D2C 브랜드의 새로운 마케팅 기회를 제시합니다.
so_what_en: AI-generated imagery for product discovery presents new marketing opportunities for D2C brands.
key_points: AI-generated product images for search results
Visual search technology integration
Designed to improve product discovery
Amazon's innovative approach to search enhancement
one_line_insight_ko: AI 생성 이미지가 전자상거래 제품 발견의 새로운 패러다임을 만들고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI-generated imagery is creating a new paradigm for e-commerce product discovery.

title: Indeed addresses job market disconnect with ads that put people first
description: The “Jobs Need People” campaign depicts moments of peer-to-peer connection that make work fulfilling amid a rise in trends like employer ghosting.
title_en: Indeed Launches People-First Job Marketing Campaign
summary_ko: Indeed가 직장 내 인간적 연결을 강조하는 'Jobs Need People' 캠페인을 출시했습니다. 이 캠페인은 고용주 무응답과 같은 트렌드가 증가하는 가운데 일을 의미 있게 만드는 동료 간 연결을 묘사합니다. 구인시장의 단절 문제를 해결하고 인간 중심의 가치를 마케팅 메시지로 전달하는 전략입니다.
summary_en: Indeed launched the 'Jobs Need People' campaign emphasizing human connections in the workplace. The campaign depicts peer-to-peer connections that make work fulfilling amid rising trends like employer ghosting. It addresses job market disconnects by putting human-centered values at the core of its marketing message.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 자동화와 AI 시대에도 인간적 가치와 연결을 강조하는 마케팅 메시지로 고객과의 정서적 유대감을 강화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can strengthen emotional bonds with customers by emphasizing human values and connections in marketing messages even in the age of automation and AI.
key_points: Focus on human-centered messaging amid digital transformation
Address market disconnects through empathetic communication
Peer-to-peer connection as core campaign element
one_line_insight_ko: AI 시대에도 인간적 가치를 중심으로 한 마케팅 메시지가 고객 연결의 핵심이 됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: Human-centered marketing messages remain crucial for customer connection even in the AI era.

title: Salesforce pushes agentic marketing from planning to pipeline
description:
Salesforce introduced new marketing agents that can qualify leads, create content, launch campaigns, and optimize performance across channels.
The post Salesforce pushes agentic marketing from planning to pipeline appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Salesforce Introduces AI Marketing Agents for Campaign Automation
summary_ko: Salesforce가 리드 자격 확인, 콘텐츠 제작, 캠페인 실행, 성과 최적화를 수행하는 새로운 마케팅 에이전트를 출시했습니다. 이 AI 에이전트들은 계획부터 파이프라인까지 마케팅 전 과정을 자동화합니다. 에이전틱 마케팅 시대의 본격적인 시작을 알리는 혁신적 솔루션입니다.
summary_en: Salesforce introduced new marketing agents that can qualify leads, create content, launch campaigns, and optimize performance across channels. These AI agents automate the entire marketing process from planning to pipeline. This represents a significant innovation marking the beginning of the agentic marketing era.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 AI 마케팅 에이전트를 활용해 개인화된 고객 여정 전반의 자동화와 최적화를 통해 효율성과 성과를 극대화할 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can maximize efficiency and performance through automation and optimization of personalized customer journeys using AI marketing agents.
key_points: AI agents handle lead qualification to campaign optimization
End-to-end marketing automation from planning to execution
Cross-channel performance optimization capabilities
one_line_insight_ko: AI 마케팅 에이전트가 계획부터 실행까지 전 과정을 자동화하여 마케팅의 패러다임을 바꾸고 있습니다.
one_line_insight_en: AI marketing agents are transforming marketing paradigms by automating the entire process from planning to execution.

title: Why ‘it’s just SEO’ could cost the industry billions
description:
Treating generative search as business as usual risks shrinking the very market search marketers should be expanding.
The post Why ‘it’s just SEO’ could cost the industry billions appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: Generative Search Revolution Could Cost SEO Industry Billions
summary_ko: 생성형 검색을 단순한 SEO 연장선으로 취급하는 것이 업계에 수십억 달러의 손실을 가져올 수 있다는 경고가 나왔습니다. 검색 마케터들이 확장해야 할 시장을 오히려 축소시킬 위험성이 있다고 지적됩니다. 생성형 검색 시대에 맞는 새로운 마케팅 전략과 접근법이 필요합니다.
summary_en: Treating generative search as just an extension of SEO could cost the industry billions of dollars in losses. There's a risk of shrinking the very market that search marketers should be expanding. New marketing strategies and approaches are needed for the generative search era.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 기존 SEO 관점을 넘어 생성형 AI 검색 환경에 최적화된 콘텐츠 전략과 고객 발견 경험을 새롭게 설계해야 합니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands must redesign content strategies and customer discovery experiences optimized for generative AI search environments beyond traditional SEO perspectives.
key_points: Generative search requires fundamentally new approaches beyond SEO
Risk of market shrinkage from outdated strategies
Billions at stake in search marketing transformation
one_line_insight_ko: 생성형 검색은 기존 SEO를 넘어선 완전히 새로운 마케팅 패러다임을 요구합니다.
one_line_insight_en: Generative search demands an entirely new marketing paradigm beyond traditional SEO.

title: Customer portals, more AI in HubSpot’s April update
description:
April’s HubSpot updates focused on reducing friction for your team and your customers. Here’s what you need to know. 
The post Customer portals, more AI in HubSpot’s April update appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: HubSpot Enhances Customer Experience with AI and Portal Updates
summary_ko: HubSpot이 4월 업데이트에서 고객 포털과 더 많은 AI 기능을 추가했습니다. 이번 업데이트는 팀과 고객 모두의 마찰을 줄이는 데 초점을 맞췄습니다. AI 기능 강화를 통해 고객 경험 개선과 운영 효율성 향상을 동시에 추구하는 전략입니다.
summary_en: HubSpot added customer portals and more AI features in its April update. The updates focused on reducing friction for both teams and customers. This strategy simultaneously pursues customer experience improvement and operational efficiency enhancement through AI feature enhancement.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 고객 포털과 AI 기능을 통합하여 셀프 서비스 경험을 강화하고 고객 지원 효율성을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can enhance self-service experiences and improve customer support efficiency by integrating customer portals with AI features.
key_points: Customer portals reduce friction for self-service
AI enhancements improve operational efficiency
Focus on both team and customer experience optimization
one_line_insight_ko: 고객 포털과 AI 기능의 결합이 셀프 서비스 경험 개선의 핵심 솔루션이 됩니다.
one_line_insight_en: The combination of customer portals and AI features becomes the key solution for improving self-service experiences.

title: How to activate first-party data across the B2B journey
description:
Behavioral signals, intent data, and AI can improve personalization, sales alignment, and pipeline performance across complex buying journeys.
The post How to activate first-party data across the B2B journey appeared first on MarTech.
title_en: First-Party Data Activation Transforms B2B Customer Journeys
summary_ko: 행동 신호, 의도 데이터, AI를 활용한 퍼스트파티 데이터 활성화가 복잡한 B2B 구매 여정에서 개인화를 개선하고 있습니다. 세일즈 팀 정렬과 파이프라인 성과 향상이 주요 효과로 나타납니다. 데이터 기반 고객 여정 최적화가 B2B 마케팅의 핵심 전략으로 부상하고 있습니다.
summary_en: First-party data activation using behavioral signals, intent data, and AI is improving personalization across complex B2B buying journeys. Key benefits include improved sales alignment and pipeline performance. Data-driven customer journey optimization is emerging as a core B2B marketing strategy.
so_what_ko: D2C 브랜드는 퍼스트파티 데이터와 AI를 결합하여 고객의 구매 의도를 정확히 파악하고 개인화된 여정을 제공해 전환율을 높일 수 있습니다.
so_what_en: D2C brands can increase conversion rates by combining first-party data with AI to accurately identify customer purchase intent and provide personalized journeys.
key_points: Behavioral signals and intent data drive personalization
AI enhances complex buying journey optimization
Sales-marketing alignment through data activation
one_line_insight_ko: 퍼스트파티 데이터와 AI의 결합이 복잡한 고객 여정에서 개인화의 새로운 기준을 제시합니다.
one_line_insight_en: The combination of first-party data and AI sets new standards for personalization in complex customer journeys.
